_comment: Phase 11 close 2026-05-02. Sprint 11.2 SWC swap retried + LANDED: every TypeORM cross-entity property wrapped in Relation<> type alias (12 entity files), breaking the legacy-decorator circular emit chain that blocked Phase 10's first attempt. Full BE suite 519s → 119s (~4×); --testTimeout 30s → 15s. Coverage thresholds re-pinned to SWC actuals (89/75/87/89): SWC's decoratorMetadata: true emits more instrumentable nodes than ts-jest (~1pt line/branch shift), but functions coverage RISES from 85.80 → 87.19. Earlier Phase 10 close: Sprint 10.1 fixed Bug 2 (MessageFeedback messageId column lookup); Sprint 10.2 fixed Bug 1 (TIMESTAMPTZ migration); Sprint 10.3 added Redis testcontainer + bullmq scheduler integration. All 6 it.skip Phase 9 markers in chat-repository-typeorm.integration.test.ts now green (41/41 with RUN_INTEGRATION=true).
_comment_mutation: Formula 2026-05-17 (TD-37 pérein, evolutif 10 ans): mutationScore = (Killed + Timeout) / (Killed + Survived + Timeout + RuntimeError). Timeout counted as kill per CLAUDE.md § Pièges connus doctrine ('Stryker classifie souvent un vrai kill comme Timeout quand les tests laissent des open handles' — validated 2026-05-16 5/5 sample). Killed-only metric tracked separately as `mutationScoreKilled` for diagnostics, NOT enforced (would penalise the codebase for open-handles leak unrelated to test quality). Survived (287) is the real signal of test-gap: any growth = regression. Baseline 2026-05-17: effective 95.77% ((2169+4594)/7062), killed-only 30.71% (2169/7062). Cap 95 = current floor with ~0.8 headroom. Evolution path: (a) T3.1/T3.2 open-handles fix → Timeout shrinks toward Killed, effective score stays ≥95, killed-only rises toward 95 — both converge; (b) raise cap 95→97 once survived count drops below 200; (c) enterprise target 98+. NoCoverage (923) excluded from denominator — uncoverable by current tests, mitigation is adding tests, not lowering cap. No SKIP_MUTATION_RATCHET env-var — UFR-020.
